headline: Diffusion Models in Depth: From DDPM to Stable Diffusion
description: Diffusion models have replaced GANs as the dominant generative modeling paradigm. By learning to reverse a noise-adding process, they produce state-of-the-art image, video, 3D, and audio generation.

citation.name: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models (Stable Diffusion)
